official_site_search_notes: Official Ashby posting found directly for Solace Data Analyst; search result crawled within the last two weeks and page is live.
validation_notes: Rejected 2026-04-30: official Ashby page appears live, but no true posting date was exposed; search-result crawl freshness is not accepted as proof that the job was posted within 60 days.
job_description:
# Data Analyst
Company: Solace
Source: Official company posting via Ashby
Employment type: Full-time
Checked: April 30, 2026
URL: https://jobs.ashbyhq.com/solace/d33b9659-7c3d-48a9-9a24-dd0f903e3a03/

## Highlights
- Remote United States full-time Data Analyst role at a healthcare advocacy/telehealth company.
- Role is in the Data department and supports operational excellence, scalable analytics systems, and business decision-making.
- Healthcare context includes helping patients navigate care and improve outcomes.
strengths: Remote full-time healthcare data role with operational analytics and scalable reporting themes.
Good match for SQL/reporting, stakeholder support, and data quality positioning.
Health navigation domain aligns adjacent to payer/member experience.
gaps: Posting excerpt does not expose detailed required tools; verify SQL/BI stack before applying.
Less explicit payer/claims/ETL validation than strongest target roles.
notes: Apply if time. Tailor toward healthcare operations analytics, SQL reporting, scalable dashboards, stakeholder insights, and data quality.

replacements.find: ETL Analyst | Healthcare Data Analyst | Data Quality & Warehouse Analyst
replacements.replace: Healthcare Data Analyst | Operations Analytics | SQL Reporting
